ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" INTEGER /* The date of the market data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* The day of the week */,
  "period" REAL /* The period of the day */,
  "nsw_price" REAL /* Electricity price in New South Wales */,
  "nsw_demand" REAL /* Electricity demand in New South Wales */,
  "vic_price" REAL /* Electricity price in Victoria */,
  "vic_demand" REAL /* Electricity demand in Victoria */,
  "transfer" REAL /* Power transfer between states */,
  "class" TEXT /* Market condition classification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, API, manual input) */,
  "quality_index" REAL /* Reliability or quality index of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions affecting the market data */,
  "fuel_prices" REAL /* Prices of different fuels influencing electricity prices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "nsw_price" REAL /* Historical electricity price in New South Wales */,
  "vic_price" REAL /* Historical electricity price in Victoria */,
  "forecast_price_nsw" REAL /* Forecasted electricity price in New South Wales */,
  "forecast_price_vic" REAL /* Forecasted electricity price in Victoria */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., real-time, historical, forecast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_data" (
  "demand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "nsw_demand" REAL /* Historical electricity demand in New South Wales */,
  "vic_demand" REAL /* Historical electricity demand in Victoria */,
  "forecast_demand_nsw" REAL /* Forecasted electricity demand in New South Wales */,
  "forecast_demand_vic" REAL /* Forecasted electricity demand in Victoria */,
  "demand_source" TEXT /* Source of the demand data (e.g., real-time, historical, forecast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer_data" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "transfer" REAL /* Historical power transfer between New South Wales and Victoria */,
  "forecast_transfer" REAL /* Forecasted power transfer between New South Wales and Victoria */,
  "transfer_source" TEXT /* Source of the transfer data (e.g., real-time, historical, forecast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., generator, distributor, trader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
